name: Shaanxi Xinghua Chemistry Co.,Ltd
summary: Shaanxi Xinghua Chemistry Co.,Ltd produces and sells ammonium nitrate products primarily in China. The company also offers methanol, synthetic ammonia, sulfur, liquid oxygen, liquid argon and nitrogen, monomethylamine, dimethylamine, trimethylamine, dimethylformamide, and ammonium sulfate. Its products are used in the civil explosion and compound fertilizer industries. The company was founded in 1997 and is based in Xingping, China.
